verses.1: I will sing of the loving kindness of the LORD forever.
verses.2: I indeed declare, “Love stands firm forever.
verses.3: “I have made a covenant with my chosen one,
verses.5: The heavens will praise your wonders, LORD,
verses.6: For who in the skies can be compared to the LORD?
verses.7: a very awesome God in the council of the holy ones,
verses.8: LORD, God of Armies, who is a mighty one, like you?
verses.9: You rule the pride of the sea.
verses.10: You have broken Rahab in pieces, like one of the slain.
verses.12: You have created the north and the south.
verses.14: Righteousness and justice are the foundation of your throne.
verses.15: Blessed are the people who learn to acclaim you.
verses.16: In your name they rejoice all day.
verses.17: For you are the glory of their strength.
verses.18: For our shield belongs to the LORD,
verses.19: Then you spoke in vision to your saints,
verses.20: I have found David, my servant.
verses.21: with whom my hand shall be established.
verses.23: I will beat down his adversaries before him,
verses.24: But my faithfulness and my loving kindness will be with him.
verses.25: I will set his hand also on the sea,
verses.26: He will call to me, ‘You are my Father,
verses.27: I will also appoint him my firstborn,
verses.28: I will keep my loving kindness for him forever more.
verses.29: I will also make his offspring endure forever,
verses.30: If his children forsake my law,
verses.32: then I will punish their sin with the rod,
verses.33: But I will not completely take my loving kindness from him,
verses.34: I will not break my covenant,
verses.35: Once I have sworn by my holiness,
verses.37: It will be established forever like the moon,
verses.38: But you have rejected and spurned.
verses.39: You have renounced the covenant of your servant.
verses.40: You have broken down all his hedges.
verses.41: All who pass by the way rob him.
verses.42: You have exalted the right hand of his adversaries.
verses.43: Yes, you turn back the edge of his sword,
verses.45: You have shortened the days of his youth.
verses.47: Remember how short my time is,
verses.48: What man is he who shall live and not see death,
verses.49: Lord, where are your former loving kindnesses,
verses.50: Remember, Lord, the reproach of your servants,
verses.51: With which your enemies have mocked, LORD,
verses.52: Blessed be the LORD forever more.
